basic_details.job_title: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu has officially announced the Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 02-07-2026 at the official website www.mes.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria (maximum 70 years) and hold an MBBS degree with valid Medical Council registration can now attend the walk-in selection on 10-07-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply (walk-in) are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree, Valid Medical Council Registration
qualification.details: MBBS Degree Valid Medical Council Registration

rows.cordite_factory_aruvankadu: MBBS Degree, Valid Medical Council Registration

content_sections.heading: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Hired Medical Practitioner Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Hired Medical Practitioner Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Hired Medical Practitioner Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS Degree Valid Medical Council Registration

content_sections.heading: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Hired Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Hired Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Hired Medical Practitioner post at Cordite Factory Aruvankadu is scheduled for 10th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Hired Medical Practitioner position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Hired Medical Practitioner position, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree and a Valid Medical Council Registration. This is a mandatory requirement for all applicants.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Hired Medical Practitioner role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Hired Medical Practitioner position is 70 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Hired Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Hired Medical Practitioner post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Hired Medical Practitioner recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Hired Medical Practitioner post at Cordite Factory Aruvankadu will primarily involve an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Cordite Factory Aruvankadu, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 643202. Candidates are advised to note the address and plan their travel accordingly.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including their MBBS degree certificate, Medical Council Registration, ID proof, and any other relevant certificates. Self-attested photocopies of these documents are also required.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Hired Medical Practitioner position at Cordite Factory Aruvankadu is a contractual job. The appointment is for a specific period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. What is the probable joining date after the interview?
faq.answer: The probable joining date for the selected candidate is 20th July 2026. This date is subject to the successful completion of the selection process and formalities.
